_meta.title: Kenya CBC Curriculum Reference Data
_meta.description: Portable reference dataset mapping CBC grade names to learning areas, strands, sub-strands, and learning outcomes. The backend loads this file when seeding curriculum for a CBC school.
_meta.source: docs/cbc/*.json — compiled from KICD curriculum designs (kicd.ac.ke)
_meta.usage: Match grade.name against the grades seeded in 000002_seed.up.sql, then insert learning areas, strands, sub-strands, and outcomes using runtime-allocated UUIDs.

sub_strands.name: Listening and Attention
outcomes: Develop appropriate listening skills from varied experiences to enrich communication
Demonstrate sustained attention during conversations, stories, and instructions
Respond appropriately to verbal and non-verbal cues in everyday interactions

sub_strands.name: Free Expression
outcomes: Express own opinions, needs, ideas, and feelings creatively and confidently
Appreciate the opinions and feelings of others during shared conversations

sub_strands.name: Auditory Discrimination
outcomes: Distinguish between different environmental sounds to enhance phonological awareness
Identify and match similar sounds in words, chants, and rhymes

sub_strands.name: Visual Discrimination
outcomes: Differentiate shapes, sizes, colors, and symbols to build reading readiness
Track objects visually from left to right to establish proper eye movement for reading

sub_strands.name: Book Handling Skills
outcomes: Demonstrate correct book orientation by holding a book upright and turning pages from right to left
Show care for books and reading materials by handling them gently

sub_strands.name: Print Awareness
outcomes: Recognize that print carries meaning and conveys a message
Identify common signs, labels, and logos within their immediate environment

sub_strands.name: Pre-Number Activities (Matching and Sorting)
outcomes: Sort and classify objects according to a single attribute such as color, shape, or size
Match objects in a one-to-one correspondence to build a foundation for counting
Arrange objects in simple patterns or linear sequences based on size

sub_strands.name: Rote Counting
outcomes: Count sequentially from 1 to 10 using rhymes, songs, and real objects
Demonstrate an awareness of number names in sequence

sub_strands.name: Number Recognition and Value
outcomes: Identify and name numerals from 1 to 5 in their environment
Map numerals 1 to 5 to their corresponding concrete quantities

sub_strands.name: Size and Length Comparison
outcomes: Compare objects using terms such as big/small, long/short, or tall/short
Order up to three objects sequentially according to height or length

sub_strands.name: Parts of the Body
outcomes: Identify and name basic external body parts and state their main functions
Demonstrate appreciation for their own body and physical uniqueness

sub_strands.name: Personal Hygiene
outcomes: Practice simple personal hygiene routines such as washing hands, brushing teeth, and wiping the nose
Use the toilet or latrine appropriately and wash hands afterwards

sub_strands.name: My Family and School
outcomes: Name immediate family members and recognize their roles within the home
Identify key places and people within the school compound

sub_strands.name: Safe and Unsafe Environments
outcomes: Identify potentially dangerous objects and areas at home and school
Demonstrate standard safety precautions when playing or walking

sub_strands.name: Locomotor and Non-Locomotor Movements
outcomes: Perform basic movements including walking, running, jumping, hopping, and skipping safely
Demonstrate body balance, agility, and coordination during group games

sub_strands.name: Manipulation and Coordination
outcomes: Manipulate materials through modeling, tearing, pasting, and threading to develop finger muscles
Demonstrate hand-eye coordination by scribbling or coloring within broad outlines

sub_strands.name: Music and Movement
outcomes: Sing simple songs and perform rhythmic movements in response to different tempos
Play basic percussion instruments and sound-makers collaboratively

sub_strands.name: God the Creator
outcomes: Recognize God as the creator of themselves, other people, and the natural environment
Express gratitude to God through simple short prayers and songs

sub_strands.name: The Holy Bible
outcomes: Handle the Bible with respect as a special book containing God's word
Listen attentively to short biblical stories and extract simple moral lessons

sub_strands.name: Listening and Attention
outcomes: Listen attentively to extended stories, instructions, and conversations for details
Respond accurately and appropriately to complex verbal prompts and questions

sub_strands.name: Free Expression
outcomes: Communicate ideas, desires, feelings, and personal experiences clearly and fluently using complete sentences
Take turns constructively during structured classroom conversations and peer discussions

sub_strands.name: Phonological Awareness
outcomes: Identify, blend, and segment rhyming words, syllables, and initial sounds in spoken words
Produce letter sounds accurately for basic consonant-vowel-consonant (CVC) patterns

sub_strands.name: Print and Word Awareness
outcomes: Track text visually from left to right and top to bottom with emerging consistency
Recognize sight words and common functional words within the print environment

sub_strands.name: Reading Comprehension
outcomes: Predict outcomes or next steps in a story based on illustrations and contextual clues
Recall and sequence main events or characters from a read-aloud narrative

sub_strands.name: Patterning and Controlled Writing
outcomes: Form upper and lower case letters legibly using correct directional strokes
Write personal names and simple three-letter words independently with proper spacing

sub_strands.name: Classification and Pairing
outcomes: Sort and classify a collection of concrete objects based on two simultaneous attributes such as size and color
Create and extend simple repeating patterns using concrete objects, shapes, or drawings

sub_strands.name: Counting and Cardinality
outcomes: Count objects sequentially up to 20 using concrete representations and one-to-one correspondence
Represent quantities up to 10 using concrete objects, drawings, and numerals

sub_strands.name: Number Operations
outcomes: Demonstrate the concept of addition as putting together objects up to a sum of 9
Demonstrate the concept of subtraction as taking away objects from a group up to 9

sub_strands.name: Mass, Capacity, and Time
outcomes: Compare and order objects based on mass (heavy/light) and capacity (holds more/holds less)
Identify days of the week and describe daily routines using time-relative terms like morning, afternoon, and night

sub_strands.name: Geometric Shapes
outcomes: Identify, name, and draw basic two-dimensional shapes including circles, triangles, rectangles, and squares
Recognize and point out basic shapes within objects in the immediate environment

sub_strands.name: Weather and Climate Elements
outcomes: Observe, describe, and record daily weather conditions using symbols (sunny, rainy, windy, cloudy)
Identify appropriate clothing, shelter, and activities for different weather conditions

sub_strands.name: Plants and Animals
outcomes: Identify and care for common plants and domestic animals within the locality
State basic parts of a plant and recognize safe versus dangerous plants and animals

sub_strands.name: Our Community and Helpers
outcomes: Identify and roleplay different community helpers (teachers, doctors, police officers, farmers) and their contributions
Demonstrate respect for diverse cultures, norms, and roles within the local neighborhood

sub_strands.name: Care of Resources
outcomes: Practice proper disposal of waste and conservation of water and electricity at home and school
Demonstrate care and responsibility for personal and shared school property

sub_strands.name: Locomotor and Manipulation Skills
outcomes: Execute complex physical skills including catching, throwing, kicking, and bouncing a ball with control
Maintain body dynamic balance while navigating obstacles or participating in structured relays

sub_strands.name: Art and Craft Production
outcomes: Create functional and decorative artifacts using techniques like paper folding, weaving, painting, and clay modeling
Express personal imagination and stories through distinct drawings and artwork

sub_strands.name: Music, Dance, and Drama
outcomes: Perform short songs, singing games, and simple rhythmic dances individually and in groups
Dramatize simple situational roles, stories, or emotional states during creative play

sub_strands.name: Early Life and Family of Jesus
outcomes: Narrate stories about the birth, childhood, and family background of Jesus Christ
Relate the obedience and growth of young Jesus to their own daily choices and family relationships

sub_strands.name: Christian Values and Conduct
outcomes: Demonstrate key Christian values such as sharing, honesty, kindness, and love during peer interactions
Apply simple biblical moral lessons to resolve everyday conflicts peacefully

sub_strands.name: Talking About Self and Immediate Environment
outcomes: Express personal needs, feelings, and experiences clearly using simple sentences
Respond appropriately to greetings, simple instructions, and questions from peers and teachers

sub_strands.name: Listening and Attention
outcomes: Listen attentively to short oral narratives, poems, and instructions to recall key details
Demonstrate appropriate digital etiquette when listening to audio devices or educational media

sub_strands.name: Word Recognition (Phonemic Awareness)
outcomes: Recognize and produce consonant-vowel-consonant (CVC) words and basic blends
Read high-frequency sight words accurately in simple contextual sentences

sub_strands.name: Reading Comprehension
outcomes: Answer direct text-based questions from short, illustrated storybooks
Sequence at least three main events from a reading text chronologically

sub_strands.name: Handwriting and Word Formation
outcomes: Form letters legibly with appropriate spacing between words
Spell simple phonetically regular words correctly in writing tasks

sub_strands.name: Number Concept and Counting
outcomes: Count forward and backward from 1 to 100 using concrete objects and charts
Identify, read, and write numbers 1 to 20 in symbols and words

sub_strands.name: Place Value
outcomes: Identify tens and ones in two-digit numbers up to 20 using bundles of sticks or counters

sub_strands.name: Addition and Subtraction
outcomes: Add two single-digit numbers up to a sum of 20 using concrete representations
Subtract single-digit numbers within 20 by taking away counters or cross-outs

sub_strands.name: Length and Mass
outcomes: Measure length of various classroom surfaces using arbitrary units like handspans and strides
Compare masses of common items using standard terms like heavier, lighter, or same as

sub_strands.name: Time and Money
outcomes: Identify Kenyan currency coins up to 20 shillings and practice simple currency matching
Tell time by the hour using analogue and digital clocks

sub_strands.name: School Routine and Environment
outcomes: Identify key locations and administrative personnel within the school setting
Demonstrate adherence to clean school habits including correct litter disposal

sub_strands.name: Care of Teeth and Personal Hygiene
outcomes: Demonstrate the correct step-by-step technique for brushing teeth
Identify healthy food options that prevent dental decay and promote body growth

sub_strands.name: Talking About School, Home, and Community
outcomes: Express thoughts, feelings, and instructions clearly using appropriate vocabulary and correct sentence structures
Listen attentively and respond politely to descriptions of everyday events and community activities

sub_strands.name: Listening for Comprehension and Vocabulary
outcomes: Identify specific information and answer literal questions from short audio clips or stories read aloud
Use new words acquired from listening tasks to construct meaningful sentences

sub_strands.name: Word Position and Silent Reading
outcomes: Read grade-level texts fluently, accurately, and with appropriate expression
Demonstrate silent reading habits while maintaining focus on short paragraphs

sub_strands.name: Reading Comprehension
outcomes: Draw logical conclusions and answer both direct and simple inferential questions from storybooks
Retell a story accurately by highlighting the main characters and setting

sub_strands.name: Punctuation and Spelling
outcomes: Apply basic punctuation marks including capital letters, periods, and question marks correctly in short sentences
Spell frequently used words and multi-syllable phonetic words accurately

learning_areas.name: Kiswahili Activities (Shughuli za Lugha ya Kiswahili)

sub_strands.name: Maamkizi na Mazungumzo
outcomes: Kuitikia na kutumia maamkizi na maneno ya adabu ipasavyo katika mazingira ya shuleni na nyumbani
Kutoa na kufuata maagizo rahisi yanayohusisha shughuli za kila siku

sub_strands.name: Kusoma kwa Sauti
outcomes: Kusoma maneno, sentensi, na vifungu vifupi kwa ufasaha, kuzingatia alama za uakifishaji
Kutambua msamiati wa kimsingi unaopatikana katika vifungu vya kusoma

sub_strands.name: Kukuza herufi na silabi
outcomes: Kuandika herufi na maneno kwa mwandiko unaosomeka na wenye nafasi ifasayo kati ya maneno

sub_strands.name: Number Concept and Representation
outcomes: Count forward and backward from 1 to 1000 in intervals of 1, 5, 10, and 100
Read and write numbers up to 100 in symbols and words

sub_strands.name: Place Value
outcomes: Identify place value of digits up to hundreds, tens, and ones using concrete structural representations

sub_strands.name: Number Patterns
outcomes: Identify missing numbers or complete ascending and descending number patterns up to 100

sub_strands.name: Addition and Subtraction
outcomes: Add up to two-digit numbers with regrouping up to a sum of 100
Subtract up to two-digit numbers without regrouping within 100

sub_strands.name: Multiplication and Division
outcomes: Represent multiplication as repeated addition using arrays or single groups up to 5x5
Represent division as equal sharing or grouping using concrete materials

sub_strands.name: Length, Mass, and Capacity
outcomes: Measure and compare lengths using non-standard and arbitrary standard units
Estimate and balance masses of objects against known classroom items
Measure capacity of liquid containers using non-standard units

sub_strands.name: Time and Money
outcomes: Tell time to the half-hour using analogue clocks
Identify Kenyan currency notes and coins up to 50 shillings and perform simple mental calculations

sub_strands.name: Lines and Shapes
outcomes: Identify and draw straight lines, curved lines, rectangles, circles, triangles, and squares

sub_strands.name: Weather Patterns and Safe Practices
outcomes: Monitor and record regular weather trends over an extended period
Identify appropriate safety precautions to avoid injuries during adverse weather conditions

sub_strands.name: Animals and Plants in the Locality
outcomes: Group local animals based on characteristics like feeding habits or physical features
Demonstrate proper care for plants at home and around the school compound

sub_strands.name: Food and Basic First Aid
outcomes: Differentiate between healthy food groups and common non-nutritious items
Demonstrate knowledge of basic procedures when reporting accidents or minor injuries

sub_strands.name: Cleanliness of Body and Environment
outcomes: Demonstrate correct methods for washing clothes, cleaning classrooms, and standard bathroom cleaning
Practice appropriate hand hygiene behaviors at key milestones throughout the day

sub_strands.name: Safe Food Handling
outcomes: Identify correct ways to wash, store, and consume raw fruit and clean vegetables safely

sub_strands.name: Parables and Stories of Kindness
outcomes: Retell specific parables or sacred historical stories that advocate for empathy, hard work, and sharing
Demonstrate helpfulness toward elders, family members, and school peers in daily interactions

sub_strands.name: Rhythmic Gymnastics and Games
outcomes: Perform continuous physical movements like leaping, turning, rolling, and dodging with body alignment
Follow rules and show teamwork principles in non-competitive games

sub_strands.name: Drawing, Modeling, and Music
outcomes: Create balanced patterns and textures through painting, printing, or localized weaving
Sing local national and folk melodies in unison, maintaining steady rhythm and accurate tempo

sub_strands.name: Talking About Technology, Safety, and Communication
outcomes: Express complex ideas, instructions, and safety precautions clearly using a wide range of vocabulary
Listen critically to short informational texts to summarize key facts and express opinions

sub_strands.name: Language Structures and Functions
outcomes: Use pronouns, prepositions, and simple past tense regular/irregular verbs accurately in speech
Respond appropriately to open-ended questions regarding familiar topics

sub_strands.name: Fluency and Silent Reading
outcomes: Read grade-level texts at an optimal speed with appropriate phrasing, tone, and accuracy
Demonstrate sustained silent reading for pleasure and information retrieval

sub_strands.name: Reading Comprehension
outcomes: Make inferences, predict outcomes, and distinguish between fact and fiction in reading cards and storybooks
Identify the central theme, moral lesson, and sequence of events from a text

sub_strands.name: Guided and Creative Writing
outcomes: Write cohesive short paragraphs using correct sentence structures, capitalization, and punctuation
Spell unfamiliar multi-syllabic words accurately using phonetic spelling strategies

learning_areas.name: Kiswahili Activities (Shughuli za Lugha ya Kiswahili)

sub_strands.name: Kusikiliza kwa Makini na Maelezo
outcomes: Kusikiliza hadithi, habari, au maagizo na kutoa muhtasari au majibu sahihi ya maswali
Kutumia msamiati mwafaka kueleza matukio, usalama, na mazingira yanayomzunguka mwanafunzi

sub_strands.name: Kusoma kwa Ufasaha na Ufahamu
outcomes: Kusoma vifungu vya maneno kwa sauti inayosikika na kwa kasi inayofaa huku wakizingatia uakifishaji
Kujibu maswali ya ufahamu kutokana na vifungu vya kusoma (maswali ya moja kwa moja na ya mapendeleo)

sub_strands.name: Insha fupi na Imla
outcomes: Kuandika aya fupi na tungo rahisi zenye mtiririko mzuri wa mawazo na tahajia sahihi

sub_strands.name: Number Concept and Operations
outcomes: Count forward and backward from 1 to 1000 in intervals of 2, 5, 10, 50, and 100
Read, write, and represent numbers up to 1000 in symbols and numbers up to 100 in words

sub_strands.name: Place Value and Fractions
outcomes: Identify place value of digits up to thousands, hundreds, tens, and ones
Identify, read, and write simple fractions as part of a whole (half, quarter, eighth)

sub_strands.name: Addition and Subtraction
outcomes: Add up to three-digit numbers with regrouping up to a sum of 1000
Subtract up to three-digit numbers with regrouping within 1000

sub_strands.name: Multiplication and Division
outcomes: Multiply single-digit numbers by numbers up to 10 using mental strategies and arrays
Divide numbers up to 30 by single digits without a remainder through factor grouping

sub_strands.name: Length, Mass, and Capacity
outcomes: Measure length in standard units (meters) using tape measures or meter rules
Measure mass in kilograms using a simple weighing balance
Measure and compare capacity in liters using standard containers

sub_strands.name: Time and Money
outcomes: Tell time to the nearest five minutes using an analogue clock face
Perform operations involving Kenyan currency notes and coins up to 100 shillings

sub_strands.name: Position and Shapes
outcomes: Identify and trace horizontal, vertical, and diagonal lines
Make patterns using interlocking two-dimensional shapes

sub_strands.name: Soil Types and Characteristics
outcomes: Model and compare physical properties of clay, sand, and loam soils based on texture and modeling capability
Demonstrate simple methods of conserving soil erosion in the school environment

sub_strands.name: Water Conservation and Sources
outcomes: Identify local sources of clean and polluted water and discuss methods of safe harvesting
Practice practical water conservation measures like turning off taps and recycling water

sub_strands.name: Marketplace and Resources
outcomes: Describe common business transactions, types of items sold, and basic ethics in the local market
Demonstrate resource planning by reusing and recycling materials within their environment

sub_strands.name: Parasites and Preventive Practices
outcomes: Identify common external human parasites (lice, bedbugs, jiggers) and state regular preventive actions
Demonstrate appropriate methods of medicine usage, storage, and adherence to safety labels

sub_strands.name: Kitchen Safety and Food Preservation
outcomes: Identify potential hazards in a kitchen and demonstrate actions to prevent burns or accidental cuts
Practice traditional and modern simple methods of preserving common food items from contamination

sub_strands.name: Respect for Authority and Peers
outcomes: Explain the importance of respecting institutional authority, community elders, and parents based on spiritual teachings
Demonstrate honesty, inclusivity, and empathy when dealing with individuals of different backgrounds

sub_strands.name: Swimming and Gymnastics
outcomes: Execute proper body buoyancy techniques, kicking patterns, and water safety strokes independently
Perform sequences of specialized physical maneuvers including forward rolls, vaulting, and balancing with control

sub_strands.name: Crafting, Ornaments, and Puppetry
outcomes: Design and construct basic hand puppets, masks, or beaded ornaments using local sustainable materials
Create three-dimensional structures using simple modeling techniques

sub_strands.name: Music and Solos
outcomes: Perform patriotic, sacred, and topical solo songs with correct pitch, phrasing, and emotional expression
Identify and classify traditional African musical instruments within the local community

sub_strands.name: Storytelling and Riddles
outcomes: Listen to and recount local community folktales, proverbs, and riddles in the local language
Appreciate cultural heritage expressions and moral benchmarks passed down through indigenous language arts

sub_strands.name: Digital Media Literacy and Oral Communication
outcomes: Listen attentively to multi-media educational narratives to accurately summarize foundational arguments
Present brief oral reports on environmental or localized topics using varied vocabulary and accurate syntactic forms

sub_strands.name: Critical Reading and Media Literacy
outcomes: Analyze elementary digital and print media texts to answer explicit and implicit interpretive prompts
Read age-appropriate literary texts silently to establish central thematic messages and chronological structural elements

sub_strands.name: Composition and Mechanics
outcomes: Compose multi-paragraph descriptive and narrative configurations utilizing correct grammatical inflections
Apply structured punctuation matrices including quotation marks and commas in complex sentence environments

sub_strands.name: Uwasilishaji wa Kidijitali na Maongezi
outcomes: Kusikiliza kwa makini habari au simulizi za kidijitali na kuzitolea muhtasari sahihi
Kuzungumza kwa ufasaha na kutumia msamiati mwafaka kueleza mada za kijamii na mazingira

sub_strands.name: Kusoma kwa Ufahamu na Uchambuzi
outcomes: Kusoma vifungu vya habari na fasihi ya watoto ili kujibu maswali ya wazi na ya kiufahamu
Kutambua sifa za wahusika na maadili yanayojitokeza katika hadithi

sub_strands.name: Insha na Sarufi
outcomes: Kuandika insha fupi za wasifu na masimulizi zikizingatia uakifishaji na tahajia sahihi
Kutumia viambishi, ngeli za nomino, na nyakati kwa usahihi katika tungo

sub_strands.name: Whole Numbers and Place Value
outcomes: Read, write, and identify place value parameters for whole numbers up to 10,000
Round off whole numbers to the nearest tens, hundreds, and thousands

sub_strands.name: Fractions and Decimals
outcomes: Compare and order proper fractions with denominators up to 10 using concrete grids
Convert simple fractions into base-10 decimal equivalents with one decimal place

sub_strands.name: Operations (Addition, Subtraction, Multiplication, Division)
outcomes: Add and subtract whole numbers up to 4 digits with regrouping parameters up to a total of 10,000
Multiply a 3-digit number by a 1-digit number and divide 2-digit numbers by 1-digit divisors without remainders

sub_strands.name: Length, Mass, and Capacity
outcomes: Convert length metrics between meters and centimeters utilizing accurate computational models
Solve real-world addition and subtraction problems involving kilograms, grams, liters, and milliliters

sub_strands.name: Financial Literacy and Time
outcomes: Tell time down to minutes and seconds using both digital systems and traditional analogue interfaces
Perform compound transactions involving currency combinations up to 1,000 Kenyan Shillings

sub_strands.name: Lines, Angles, and Pictographs
outcomes: Identify and classify right angles, acute angles, parallel lines, and perpendicular configurations
Collect localized environmental data metrics and represent them accurately using standardized pictographs

sub_strands.name: Plants and Animals Classification
outcomes: Classify local area plants based on characteristics such as flowering status and root frameworks
Differentiate between vertebrate and invertebrate structures utilizing physical specimens and digital models

sub_strands.name: Human Body and Digestive System
outcomes: Identify, label, and outline the physiological functions of the human digestive system structures
Differentiate types of human teeth, mapping their specific structural traits to mechanical functionality

sub_strands.name: Pollution Control and Digital Simulations
outcomes: Differentiate the impacts of air, water, and soil pollution in the community and offer remedial designs
Navigate basic digital simulation components to observe environmental processes safely

sub_strands.name: States of Matter and Sound Energy
outcomes: Investigate properties of solids, liquids, and gases via localized physical experiments
Demonstrate how sound travels through different materials and describe factors altering pitch

sub_strands.name: Soil Conservation and Water Harvesting
outcomes: Construct small-scale macro-structures like simple terraces or mulching beds to curb soil degradation
Demonstrate climate-smart micro-irrigation and simple water harvesting methodologies in farming modules

sub_strands.name: Domestic Gardening and Home Nutrition
outcomes: Establish functional container gardens or innovative vertical farm structures for local vegetable crops
Practice proper food safety protocols, kitchen sorting, and basic macro-nutritional preservation steps

sub_strands.name: County Mapping and Directional Metrics
outcomes: Map local county boundaries and identify dominant geographic landmarks using the 8 points of the compass
Outline the historical significance of localized heritage infrastructure and built monuments

sub_strands.name: Cultural Interdependence and Leadership
outcomes: Describe historical migration paths and trace inter-community relationships within the county environment
Identify structural functions of county leadership frameworks and outline characteristics of ethical civic administration

sub_strands.name: Visual Arts Production and Multimedia
outcomes: Design structural patterns and 3D mockups using sustainable artistic practices and digital illustration panels
Produce functional household items using traditional pottery modeling and basic leather crafting techniques

sub_strands.name: Music, Dance, and Physical Expression
outcomes: Compose and perform short topical ensemble melodies utilizing localized scale configurations
Execute complex choreographic steps or rhythmic gymnastics balances that align with designated tempos

sub_strands.name: Scriptural Studies and Contemporary Morals
outcomes: Evaluate scriptural passages regarding fair resource distribution, community empathy, and social justice parameters
Differentiate ethical choices from deceptive behaviors within digital communication pipelines and physical encounters

sub_strands.name: Active Listening, Interpersonal Discussions, and Etiquette
outcomes: Listen attentively to multi-paragraph complex arguments to distinguish between fact and opinion
Contribute constructively to group discussions using turn-taking, appropriate vocabulary, and varied voice modulations

sub_strands.name: Fluency, Extensive Reading, and Information Retrieval
outcomes: Read grade-level prose fluently at a speed of 110–130 words per minute with appropriate expression
Analyze informational and literary texts to infer missing data and determine the writer's underlying purpose

sub_strands.name: Composition Frameworks and Applied Grammar
outcomes: Write cohesive informational and narrative compositions of up to three paragraphs using transitional devices
Apply accurate parts of speech including relative pronouns, adverbs of manner, and perfect tense configurations

sub_strands.name: Kusikiliza na Kujadili kwa undani
outcomes: Kusikiliza makala, hotuba, au midahalo na kubaini hoja kuu na upili kwa usahihi
Kujadili masuala mbalimbali kwa kutumia msamiati mwafaka na lugha yenye adabu na mtiririko mzuri

sub_strands.name: Kusoma kwa Kasi na Ufahamu wa Kina
outcomes: Kusoma vifungu vya habari na kazi za fasihi ili kuchanganua maana ya ndani na ujumbe wa mwandishi
Kufafanua methali, vitendawili, na misemo inayopatikana katika vifungu vya kusoma

sub_strands.name: Insha za Maelezo na Sarufi Teule
outcomes: Kuandika insha za maelezo, barua za kirafiki, na taarifa fupi zikizingatia kanuni zote za uandishi
Kutumia ngeli changamano, viunganishi vya wakati, na vinyume vya vitendo katika tungo

sub_strands.name: Whole Numbers up to 100,000
outcomes: Read, write, model, and identify the place value of numbers up to 100,000
Find the Total Value of digits, and round off numbers up to 100,000 to the nearest ten thousand

sub_strands.name: Multiplication, Division, and Combined Operations
outcomes: Multiply a 3-digit number by a 2-digit number with and without regrouping patterns
Divide numbers up to 3 digits by 2-digit divisors with or without remainders
Perform combined mathematical operations (BODMAS) up to numbers totaling 100,000

sub_strands.name: Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages
outcomes: Convert improper fractions into mixed numbers and vice versa through grouping models
Read, write, and add/subtract decimals up to two decimal places, and interpret percentages as hundredths

sub_strands.name: Area and Perimeter formulas
outcomes: Calculate the perimeter of composite shapes, triangles, rectangles, and squares
Determine the area of rectangular and square surfaces using unit squares and formal algorithmic models

sub_strands.name: Volume, Capacity, and Financial Planning
outcomes: Measure the volume of cubes and cuboids using standard cubic units (cm³)
Solve multi-step money problems involving bills, changes, and basic budgeting calculations within 1,000 Shillings

sub_strands.name: Angles, Triangles, and Bar Charts
outcomes: Measure and draw angles using a protractor up to 180 degrees, and classify them accordingly
Collect environmental data points and represent them cleanly via standard column and bar charts

sub_strands.name: Human Respiratory and Circulatory Systems
outcomes: Identify, sketch, and outline the core functions of the organs in the human respiratory system
Examine how the human heart and blood vessels function during regular physical activities

sub_strands.name: Fungi and Bacteria
outcomes: Classify common fungi and bacteria based on their beneficial and harmful traits within local ecosystems
Demonstrate appropriate methods of handling food to avoid bacterial and fungal spoilage

sub_strands.name: Light Energy and Reflection
outcomes: Investigate how light travels in a straight line and verify properties of reflection using plain mirrors
Construct a functional periscope using local resources to observe hidden objects

sub_strands.name: Word Processing and Basic Block-Based Programming
outcomes: Create, edit, format, and safely save textual documents using standard word processing software tools
Construct elementary linear logic sequences using drag-and-drop block-based software environments

sub_strands.name: Small Wild Animals Management and Weed Control
outcomes: Construct and implement appropriate defensive barriers or scarecrows to protect farm crops from destructive small animals
Identify common farm weeds and demonstrate structural safe methods of mechanical and physical weeding

sub_strands.name: Preservation of Excess Farm Produce and Baking
outcomes: Practice solar drying, smoking, or traditional salting techniques to preserve perishable vegetables and pulses
Prepare simple balanced baked meals safely using local open-air or localized clay ovens

strands.name: Physical Features and Climate of the Region

sub_strands.name: Physical Features, Map Reading, and Climate Zones
outcomes: Identify major rivers, mountains, and plains across the regional landscape and interpret map symbols accurately
Analyze the impact of distinct weather configurations and climate zones on local agricultural activities

sub_strands.name: Community Heritage and Judicial Systems
outcomes: Appreciate historical community leaders, physical cultural shrines, and artifacts that form the local identity
Outline the structure and fundamental roles of the local judicial systems and alternative dispute resolution pathways

sub_strands.name: Photography, Graphics, and Sculpting
outcomes: Capture digital or simulated frames utilizing basic principles of composition, balance, and angles
Carve or model structural figurines representing active living postures using local soft stones, clay, or papier-mâché

sub_strands.name: Choral Performances, Playwriting, and Descant Recorder
outcomes: Perform dynamic folk songs and choral verses collaboratively while matching standard vocal ranges and key parameters
Play structured note configurations on the descant recorder using accurate fingerings and breath coordination rules

sub_strands.name: Talents, Stewardship, and Ethical Media Behavior
outcomes: Evaluate individual talents and stewardship responsibilities based on sacred writings and ancient scriptures
Apply spiritual moral benchmarks to identify and avoid cyber-bullying, plagiarism, and misinformation on digital channels

sub_strands.name: Critical Listening, Debating, and Public Speaking
outcomes: Listen critically to complex texts and debates to identify fallacies, biases, and primary lines of reasoning
Participate effectively in formal debates using persuasive language, objective evidence, and proper elocution parameters

sub_strands.name: Advanced Reading Comprehension and Literary Analysis
outcomes: Analyze full-length children's novels and complex articles to interpret themes, character motivations, and subtext
Read grade-level texts fluently (130-150 words per minute) with targeted syntactic and emotional inflections

sub_strands.name: Functional and Creative Writing Modules
outcomes: Compose formal letters, official emails, and imaginative narratives adhering to rigorous structural and grammatical protocols
Employ complex sentence structures, active/passive voices, and advanced punctuation matrices independently

sub_strands.name: Kusikiliza kwa Makini na Hotuba
outcomes: Kusikiliza na kuchanganua hotuba au mijadala changamano na kuwasilisha maoni mbadala kwa ufasaha
Kutoa wasilisho la mdomo au hotuba fupi kuhusu masuala ibuka katika jamii kwa ujasiri

sub_strands.name: Uchambuzi wa Fasihi na Vifungu
outcomes: Kusoma na kufafanua maana fiche, itikadi, na mafunzo katika hadithi, mashairi ya arudhi, na tamthilia fupi
Kutumia kamusi na muktadha kubaini maana ya msamiati maalumu na wa kitaaluma

sub_strands.name: Uandishi wa Kazi za Kiofisi na Insha Bunifu
outcomes: Kuandika barua rasmi, ratiba za vikao, na insha za hoja zifuatazo kanuni sahihi za sarufi
Kutumia ngeli zote, viunganishi changamano, na kauli za vitendo (tendesha, tendana, tendewa) katika uandishi

sub_strands.name: Whole Numbers up to 1,000,000
outcomes: Read, write, translate, and evaluate place value matrices for whole numbers up to 1,000,000
Find the L.C.M and G.C.D of up to three numbers using prime factorization methods

sub_strands.name: Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages Optimization
outcomes: Perform operations involving addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division of fractions and decimals up to three decimal places
Convert fractions and decimals into percentages and calculate percentage profit or loss in real-world simulations

sub_strands.name: Squares and Square Roots
outcomes: Find the square of a number up to 100, and find the square root of perfect squares using factorization or inspection methods

sub_strands.name: Surface Area, Volume, and Capacity Matrices
outcomes: Calculate the surface area of cubes, cuboids, and triangular prisms using formal algebraic nets
Solve compound mathematical problems involving the volume of cylinders, cubes, and cuboids (cm³ and m³)

sub_strands.name: Speed, Time, and Financial Accounting
outcomes: Determine speed, distance, and time relationships, converting between km/h and m/s
Prepare income and expenditure statements, evaluate simple interest, and construct household budgets up to 10,000 Shillings

sub_strands.name: Angles, Construction, and Linear Equations
outcomes: Construct angles of 90°, 60°, and 45° using a pair of compasses and a ruler, and find angles on a straight line and around a point
Formulate and solve single-variable linear equations from practical scenarios

sub_strands.name: Human Excretory and Nervous System Overview
outcomes: Identify, locate, and outline the physiological functions of the human excretory organs (skin, lungs, kidneys)
Describe structural configurations of the human nervous system and relate them to basic reflex arcs

sub_strands.name: Plants and Animals Reproduction
outcomes: Examine mechanisms of pollination and fertilization in flowering plants using physical flower dissections
Differentiate internal and external fertilization methods across various animal classes

sub_strands.name: Types of Forces and Energy Transformations
outcomes: Investigate properties of magnetic, gravitational, and frictional forces using physical laboratory set-ups
Demonstrate how mechanical energy converts to electrical energy or heat through interactive models

sub_strands.name: Spreadsheets, Multimedia Development, and Coding Logic
outcomes: Design basic data models, insert formulas (SUM, AVERAGE), and map charts using standard spreadsheet tools
Develop functional branching or looping logic programs using advanced block-based or text-based educational coding engines

sub_strands.name: Domestic Poultry Management and Crop Processing
outcomes: Outline structural requirements, feeding schedules, and disease control protocols for localized poultry framing systems
Demonstrate value addition sorting, clean processing, and standard packaging of tubers and cereal yields

sub_strands.name: Special Diets and Laundering Diverse Fabrics
outcomes: Plan and compile balanced nutritional matrices catering to individuals with special dietary needs (convalescents, manually working individuals)
Identify stain removal parameters and execute appropriate laundering cycles for cotton, wool, and synthetic fabrics

sub_strands.name: Mapping East Africa and Regional Climate Data
outcomes: Map positions, relief features, and transport networks across East Africa using coordinates and scale models
Evaluate the correlations between physical climate patterns and demographic settlement distributions

sub_strands.name: National Heroes, National Integration, and Democratic Systems
outcomes: Analyze roles of national historical figures in independence struggles and list elements that foster national cohesion
Outline the structure, arms, and functional responsibilities of the National Government of Kenya (Legislature, Executive, Judiciary)

sub_strands.name: Graphic Design, Puppet Theater, and Tie-and-Dye Techniques
outcomes: Create complex commercial designs, logos, and posters incorporating precise font sizes and color combinations
Produce pattern orientations on fabric substrates using advanced folding, binding, and tie-and-dye recipes

sub_strands.name: Ensemble Performances and Musical Notation
outcomes: Read, write, and execute simple musical staff notations comprising pitch ranges and duration signatures (semibreve, minim, crotchet)
Choreograph and stage full-scale theatrical plays or traditional multi-instrument string and percussion dances

sub_strands.name: Scriptural Studies, Substance Abuse Mitigation, and Integrity
outcomes: Critique peer behaviors and modern societal trends against foundational scriptural values on honesty, temperance, and work ethic
Formulate personalized action frameworks to resist substance abuse, peer pressure, and unethical shortcuts

sub_strands.name: Critical Listening and Complex Oral Presentations
outcomes: Listen critically to extensive academic presentations to distinguish between explicit assertions and implicit assumptions
Deliver formal individual presentations on socio-economic themes using accurate intonation, stress patterns, and non-verbal cues

sub_strands.name: Literary Genres and Functional Reading
outcomes: Analyze structural elements and stylistic devices across poetry, short stories, and simple plays
Scan complex reference documents and digital materials to extract specific operational data points

sub_strands.name: Functional Writing and Syntactic Structures
outcomes: Compose formal book reviews, structural minutes of meetings, and multi-paragraph expository essays
Apply complex grammatical structures including conditional clauses, active/passive voice shifts, and modal verbs accurately

sub_strands.name: Ufahamu wa Kusikiliza na Majadiliano ya Jopo
outcomes: Kusikiliza makala changamano na kuwasilisha uchambuzi wa kina wa hoja kuu
Shiriki katika majadiliano ya jopo na midahalo rasmi ukitumia lugha sanifu na msamiati wa kitaaluma

sub_strands.name: Uchambuzi wa Fasihi na Maandishi ya Kitaaluma
outcomes: Kusoma na kuchambua vipengele vya fani na maudhui katika riwaya teule na ushairi wa kisasa
Kusoma maandishi ya taarifa kubaini mienendo na ujumbe uliokusudiwa

sub_strands.name: Uandishi wa Kazi na Muundo wa Lugha
outcomes: Kuandika tawasifu, barua rasmi za kiofisi, na tanzu mbalimbali za insha za hoja
Kutumia ngeli zote, viunganishi, mnyambuliko wa vitendo, na sentensi changamano kwa usahihi

sub_strands.name: Integers, Rational Numbers, and Real Number System
outcomes: Perform operations involving negative and positive integers on a vertical and horizontal number line
Apply laws of indices to simplify algebraic numbers and numerical expressions containing exponents

sub_strands.name: Fractions, Decimals, and Percentages Integration
outcomes: Solve real-life arithmetic problems involving compound fractions, recurring decimals, and percentage increases or decreases

sub_strands.name: Algebraic Expressions and Linear Equations
outcomes: Formulate and simplify linear algebraic expressions by collecting like terms and expanding single brackets
Form the mathematical modeling for and solve single-variable linear equations containing fractional coefficients

sub_strands.name: Pythagoras' Theorem and Conversions
outcomes: Verify and apply Pythagoras' Theorem to calculate the lengths of missing sides in right-angled triangles
Convert units of speed, area, and density into equivalent international standard configurations (SI units)

sub_strands.name: Geometrical Constructions
outcomes: Construct perpendicular bisectors of lines, angle bisectors, and specific angles (90, 45, 60, 30) using a ruler and compasses only

sub_strands.name: Separation of Mixtures and Acids, Bases, Indicators
outcomes: Perform laboratory experiments to separate mixtures using fractional distillation, paper chromatography, and crystallization
Classify everyday household substances as acidic, basic, or neutral using simple commercial and plant-extract indicators

sub_strands.name: Linear Motion, Force Types, and Heat Transfer
outcomes: Investigate linear uniform motion parameters and determine relationships between speed, distance, and time graphs
Demonstrate pathways of heat transfer via conduction, convection, and radiation using standard experimental apparatus

sub_strands.name: Microscopy and Cell Structures
outcomes: Identify parts and demonstrate correct operational handling of a light microscope to view prepared biological specimens
Compare structures and physiological differences between generalized plant cells and animal cells

strands.name: Physical Environment and Africa Map Analysis

sub_strands.name: Maps and Relief Features of Africa
outcomes: Locate countries, lines of latitude/longitude, and major climatic zones across the African continent using coordinates
Examine the tectonic theories behind the formation of major landforms like the East African Rift Valley

sub_strands.name: Human Evolution and Constitutional Governance
outcomes: Trace the archaeological evidence of human evolution and early technological stages in East Africa
Explain the historical process of constitution-making in Kenya and outline the core components of the Bill of Rights

sub_strands.name: Drawing Instruments and Geometrical Shapes
outcomes: Identify, maintain, and use technical drawing instruments to construct accurate plain geometrical configurations
Draw orthographic views of simple solid objects utilizing plane projections

sub_strands.name: Workshop Safety and Hand Tools
outcomes: Identify potential hazards in a workshop space and demonstrate strict adherence to safety procedures and emergency steps
Classify common engineering materials (metals, plastics, wood) and select appropriate hand tools for basic manipulation tasks

sub_strands.name: Land Preparation, Minimum Tillage, and Agroforestry
outcomes: Demonstrate appropriate methods of primary and secondary land preparation for crop establishment
Apply conservation agriculture principles including minimum tillage and value-added agroforestry setups

sub_strands.name: Nutritional Disorders and Food Safety
outcomes: Analyze causes, signs, and preventive measures for common nutritional deficiency disorders (kwashiorkor, marasmus, scurvy)
Apply modern and local food preservation tech blocks to prevent contamination and bacterial pathogens

sub_strands.name: Drawing, Painting, and Digital Media Production
outcomes: Apply cross-hatching, smudging, and tonal graduation techniques to render forms from observation
Design corporate identities, posters, and advertisements utilizing graphic design computer programs

sub_strands.name: Western and African Musical Notations and Instrumental Ensembles
outcomes: Read, perform, and transpose musical scores in simple time signatures containing crotchets, quavers, and semiquavers
Dramatize short scripted plays exploring contemporary issues with proper character voice, expressions, and costuming

sub_strands.name: Critical Listening for Argumentation and Interviewing Skills
outcomes: Analyze extended oral arguments to evaluate the validity of evidence and identify logical fallacies like circular reasoning
Conduct structured interviews on community issues using open-ended questions, active listening, and appropriate follow-up strategies

sub_strands.name: Thematic Analysis and Intensive Reading
outcomes: Critique the development of plot, characterization, and conflict in full-length African novellas
Examine features of functional graphics, tables, and charts to synthesize complex information within research texts

sub_strands.name: Functional Writing and Complex Grammatical Structures
outcomes: Write clear business letters, curriculum vitae (CVs), and argumentative compositions based on contemporary data
Apply accurate grammatical structures including past perfect continuous tense, relative clauses, and inverted sentence patterns

sub_strands.name: Ufahamu wa Kusikiliza na Majadiliano ya Hoja
outcomes: Kuchanganua taarifa, habari, au matangazo changamano kutoka vyombo vya habari na kutoa tathmini muhimu
Kuwasilisha hotuba za ushawishi na kushiriki katika mijadala inayozingatia kanuni za utafiti na ushahidi

sub_strands.name: Uchambuzi wa Tamthilia, Ushairi, na Maandishi ya Kitaaluma
outcomes: Kufafanua tanzu za fasihi simulizi (kama vile miviga, maghani, au maigizo) na kubaini dhima zake katika jamii
Kusoma na kufupisha makala ya kisayansi au ya kijamii yakizingatia ujumbe mkuu

sub_strands.name: Uandishi wa Kitaalamu na Matumizi ya Lugha
outcomes: Kuandika barua rasmi za kibiashara, kumbukumbu za mikutano (minutes), na insha za ulinganuzi
Kutumia viunganishi vya masharti, mnyambuliko wa vitendo katika kauli mbalimbali, na ngeli kwa usahihi wa hali ya juu

sub_strands.name: Linear Inequalities and Simultaneous Equations
outcomes: Formulate, solve, and represent linear inequalities in one variable on a standard number line
Solve pairs of simultaneous linear equations in two variables using substitution and elimination methods

sub_strands.name: Approximation and Standard Form
outcomes: Express large and small decimal numbers in standard scientific form (A × 10ⁿ where 1 ≤ A < 10)
Round numbers to a specified number of significant figures

sub_strands.name: Surface Area and Volume of Pyramids and Cones
outcomes: Calculate the surface area and volume of right pyramids and right circular cones using their respective dimensional properties
Solve real-world conversion challenges linking units of density, mass, and cubic volumes

sub_strands.name: Angle Properties of Polygons
outcomes: Find the sum of interior and exterior angles of regular and irregular convex polygons

sub_strands.name: Measures of Central Tendency and Probability Frameworks
outcomes: Calculate the mean, median, and mode for ungrouped data sets, and interpret them contextually
Determine the experimental and theoretical probability of simple combined outcomes using tree diagrams

sub_strands.name: Atomic Structure, Chemical Symbols, and Simple Equations
outcomes: Describe the atomic structure in terms of protons, neutrons, and electrons, and deduce mass and atomic numbers
Write down names, standard chemical symbols, and word equations for reactions between simple elements and oxygen or water

sub_strands.name: Static Electricity and Current Electricity Circuits
outcomes: Investigate static electricity charges using a gold-leaf electroscope setup
Set up serial and parallel electric circuits using cells, bulbs, switches, and ammeters to monitor current dynamics

sub_strands.name: Human Reproductive System and Excretory Homeostasis
outcomes: Describe the structural anatomy and physiological roles of the male and female human reproductive systems
Explain the role of the skin and kidneys in human temperature regulation and osmoregulation homeostasis

sub_strands.name: Climate Change Challenges and Adaptation Strategies
outcomes: Analyze the natural and human causes of climate change globally and assess its explicit impacts across Africa
Formulate and implement local-scale climate mitigation and adaptation frameworks within the school community

sub_strands.name: Pre-Colonial African Societies and Citizenship Dynamics
outcomes: Examine the socio-political organization of selected pre-colonial African kingdoms and communities
Analyze categories of Kenyan citizenship, processes of naturalization, and factors threatening national cohesion

sub_strands.name: Electoral Process and Civic Awareness
outcomes: Outline the components, values, and importance of democratic electoral cycles in Kenya, highlighting IEBC functional matrices

sub_strands.name: Isometric Drawing Projections and Circuit Layouts
outcomes: Construct accurate isometric drawings of basic blocks and mechanical joints from provided orthographic planes
Interpret and draw elementary schematic wiring circuits utilizing international electronic symbols

sub_strands.name: Simple Mechanisms and Power Transmission
outcomes: Identify and demonstrate the working mechanisms of levers, pulleys, gears, and inclined planes in daily machinery
Apply safety procedures when handling electrical components, soldering devices, or localized bench hand-tools

sub_strands.name: Crop Pests Management and Domestic Livestock Feeding
outcomes: Identify common field and storage crop pests, analyzing their damage and executing non-chemical biological controls
Classify livestock feeds into roughages and concentrates, and balance simple feeding ratios for domestic farm units

sub_strands.name: Food Hygiene, Reheating Food, and Kitchen Tools Maintenance
outcomes: Demonstrate proper methods of reheating leftover meals safely to eliminate bacterial toxins and minimize nutrient depletion
Clean, sharpen, and apply rust-prevention maintenance routines across a variety of kitchen utensils and structural tools

sub_strands.name: Fabric Decoration, Block Printing, and Digital Photography
outcomes: Create balanced block-printed designs on textile substrates using localized motifs and sustainable ink solutions
Edit digital images using software extensions to alter exposure, contrast, cropping bounds, and narrative values

sub_strands.name: Musical Scale Building, Group Drama, and Score Auditing
outcomes: Construct and sing major musical scales (including C major and G major) on staff grids using proper key signatures
Rehearse and present original skits or short plays featuring clear climactic resolutions, sound effects, and spatial blockers

sub_strands.name: Critical Listening, Symposiums, and Rhetorical Devices
outcomes: Evaluate extended panel presentations and public speeches to decode rhetorical devices (ethos, pathos, logos) and subtle propoganda techniques
Lead complex symposium sessions and academic presentations with stylistic fluency, adapting tone and register to audience profiles

sub_strands.name: Comparative Literature and Contextual Analysis
outcomes: Compare themes, archetypal character sets, and localized cultural conflicts across distinct multi-cultural poetry anthologies and play scripts
Synthesize dense information from complex legal, technical, and informational texts to validate or challenge specific hypotheses

sub_strands.name: Advanced Functional Genres and Syntactic Control
outcomes: Compose comprehensive investigative reports, critical research essays, and legalistic business proposals incorporating parenthetical citations
Demonstrate absolute control over complex syntax patterns including subjunctive mood configurations, relative pronoun tracking, and compound-complex configurations

sub_strands.name: Uchambuzi wa Hotuba na Majadiliano ya Kongamano
outcomes: Kusikiliza, kuchambua, na kukosoa kwa kina taarifa na hotuba rasmi za kitaifa na kimataifa
Kuendesha makongamano na kuwasilisha mada changamano kwa Kiswahili fasaha, ufasaha wa matamshi na utumiaji wa mbinu za ushawishi

sub_strands.name: Uhakiki wa Fasihi na Maandishi Teule
outcomes: Kuhakiki tamthilia na riwaya za Kiswahili kwa kuchambua dhamira, migogoro, falsafa ya mwandishi, na matumizi ya lugha ya kisanii
Kusoma na kufafanua fasihi simulizi changamano kama vile miviga, migaji, na visasili vya kijamii

sub_strands.name: Uandishi wa Kitaalamu na Sarufi ya Kina
outcomes: Kuandika ripoti za utafiti, risala, na insha changamano za kitaaluma zilizofanyiwa marejeleo ya kutosha
Kutumia kwa ufasaha miundo yote ya sentensi (rahisi, ambatano, changamano), usemi wa taarifa na usemi halisi, na unyambulishaji wa vitendo

sub_strands.name: Quadratic Expressions, Equations, and Cartesian Graphs
outcomes: Expand quadratic expressions and factorize expressions of the form ax² + bx + c = 0 using various algebraic methods
Determine the gradient, mid-point, and length of a straight line segment plotted on a 2D Cartesian coordinate grid system
Formulate and solve quadratic equations from practical problems and draw their corresponding parabolic curves

sub_strands.name: Trigonometric Ratios and Surface Area/Volume of Spheres
outcomes: Define, calculate, and apply the primary trigonometric ratios (sine, cosine, tangent) to find lengths and angles in right-angled triangles
Calculate the surface area and volume of regular spheres, hemispheres, and compound geometric solids encountered in design setups

sub_strands.name: Transformation Geometry
outcomes: Perform reflection, rotation, and translation transformations on geometric figures within a coordinate plane mapping framework

sub_strands.name: Grouped Data Metrics and Advanced Financial Math
outcomes: Construct frequency distribution tables for grouped data and compute the estimated mean and modal class metrics
Calculate compound interest over extended durations, compound depreciation, and interpret simple stock market indices and tax matrices (PAYE models)

sub_strands.name: The Periodic Table, Chemical Bonds, and Simple Chemical Reactions
outcomes: Explain the arrangement of elements in the periodic table based on atomic structure and identify trends across periods and down groups
Investigate how ionic and covalent chemical bonds form and construct balanced chemical equations for reactions between simple metals and dilute acids

sub_strands.name: Electromagnetic Waves, Sound Propagation, and Light Refraction
outcomes: Examine the properties and uses of components within the electromagnetic spectrum and investigate the laws of light refraction using glass blocks
Determine speed, frequency, and wavelength properties of transverse and longitudinal waves moving through media fields

sub_strands.name: Introduction to Genetics, Inheritance, and Environmental Sustainability
outcomes: Describe structural configurations of chromosomes and DNA and explain how basic dominant and recessive traits pass across generations
Evaluate the role of ecological interactions (food webs, nutrient cycles) and formulate systemic frameworks to mitigate local environmental crises

sub_strands.name: Global Climatic Systems and Major Economic Blocs
outcomes: Map and analyze the physical characteristics of major global climatic zones and their explicitly correlated economic activities
Examine the historical formation, objectives, and administrative structures of major global and African economic organizations (e.g., EAC, COMESA, AU, UN)

sub_strands.name: The Struggle for Independence, Constitutional Rights, and Global Relations
outcomes: Critique political and armed paths to Kenyan independence, highlighting key nationalist organizational frameworks
Analyze the structures and operational profiles of the devolved governance system in Kenya (County Assemblies vs. County Executives)
Evaluate the roles and duties of an individual within global governance, human rights declarations, and international conflict resolution processes

sub_strands.name: Sectional Views, Development of Surfaces, and CAD Overview
outcomes: Construct standard sectional orthographic views of complex mechanical assemblies to expose internal structural traits
Draw accurate development patterns of prisms, cylinders, and pyramids for sheet-metal fabrication operations
Navigate basic computer-aided design (CAD) software interfaces to compile linear engineering geometries and wireframe models

sub_strands.name: Fluid Systems, Sensors, and Basic Automation Frameworks
outcomes: Demonstrate the engineering applications of simple hydraulic and pneumatic principles in everyday mechanical machinery
Design and construct basic electronic automated warning or tracking systems incorporating sensors, microcontrollers, and logic relays

sub_strands.name: Farm Records, Agribusiness Models, and Smart Farming Technology
outcomes: Prepare, analyze, and interpret complex farm accounting tools, income statements, inventory records, and production budgets
Evaluate agribusiness marketing models and outline applications of modern automated sensors or drip automation systems in crop handling

strands.name: Nutrition, Food Technology, and Hospitality Foundation

sub_strands.name: Catering Principles, Meal Planning, and Food Chemistry Basics
outcomes: Plan, cost, cook, and display large-scale healthy multi-course meals adhering to commercial food safety and hospitality guidelines
Examine factors that induce chemical changes or spoilage in food nutrients during standard thermal processing, cooking, and fermentation cycles

sub_strands.name: Exhibition Layouts, Portfolio Management, and Commercial Art
outcomes: Plan, organize, and curate a formal school art exhibition displaying diverse artistic styles and calculating commercial values
Create complex corporate marketing advertisements, digital vectors, and brand identity guides for localized business entities

sub_strands.name: Four-Part Harmony, Play Direction, and Musical Performance Masterclasses
outcomes: Identify and sing or play melodies tracking basic four-part harmonic voicings (Soprano, Alto, Tenor, Bass) on a grand staff grid
Direct, block, stage, and evaluate full-length theatrical narratives incorporating audio engineering elements and aesthetic set designs

sub_strands.name: Real Numbers
outcomes: Identify and categorise whole numbers as odd, even, prime, composite, rational and irrational
Use the reciprocal of real numbers to work out mathematical tasks

sub_strands.name: Application of Indices and Logarithms
outcomes: Derive and apply the laws of indices in different situations
Determine and apply common logarithms of numbers in mathematical computations

sub_strands.name: Formation and Simplification of Quadratic Expressions
outcomes: Form quadratic expressions from given mathematical statements or real-life situations
Simplify quadratic expressions using appropriate mathematical operations

sub_strands.name: Quadratic Functions and Identities
outcomes: Solve quadratic equations using the quadratic formula, completing the square, and graphical techniques
Analyze properties of parabolas including vertex positioning, axis of symmetry, and roots estimation

sub_strands.name: Surds, Logarithms, and Sequences
outcomes: Simplify expressions containing numerical surds and rationalize denominators using conjugate pairs
Apply the laws of logarithms to solve exponential equations modeling population growth or compound decay systems

sub_strands.name: Trigonometric Graphs and Sine/Cosine Rules
outcomes: Plot and interpret trigonometric functions y = sin(x), y = cos(x), and y = tan(x) for angles up to 360°
Apply the Sine and Cosine rules to compute missing dimensions and angles in non-right-angled oblique triangles

sub_strands.name: Linear Motion and Newton's Laws of Motion
outcomes: Derive and apply the equations of uniformly accelerated linear motion (v = u + at, s = ut + ½at², v² = u² + 2as)
Investigate Newton's three laws of motion experimentally and solve problems linking force, mass, and acceleration vector matrices

sub_strands.name: Refraction of Light and Thin Lenses
outcomes: Verify Snell's law and determine the refractive index of glass and liquid mediums using ray-tracing techniques
Construct ray diagrams to determine image positions, magnification parameters, and characteristics for concave and convex thin lenses

sub_strands.name: The Mole Concept and Stoichiometry
outcomes: Define Avogadro's constant and compute moles, molar masses, and reacting volumes for gaseous and aqueous substances
Determine empirical and molecular formulas from percentage elemental composition data collections

sub_strands.name: Gas Laws
outcomes: Investigate and verify Boyle's Law, Charles's Law, and the Ideal Gas Equation through experimental simulation models

sub_strands.name: Hydrocarbons (Alkanes, Alkenes, Alkynes)
outcomes: Name, draw, and construct structural models for straight-chain alkanes, alkenes, and alkynes up to carbon-5 using IUPAC nomenclature Rules
Differentiate saturated and unsaturated hydrocarbons using chemical tests including bromine water and acidified KMnO₄ solutions

sub_strands.name: Gaseous Exchange in Plants and Animals
outcomes: Examine structural mechanics of stomata and lenticels and explain the physiological processes matching plant gaseous transport
Dissect and analyze respiratory mechanisms in insects (tracheal systems), fish (gills), and mammals (alveolar gas transport loops)

sub_strands.name: Monohybrid Inheritance and Mitosis/Meiosis
outcomes: Model genetic crossings for monohybrid inheritance patterns using genetic diagrams and Punnett squares to predict phenotypic variations
Examine phases of mitosis and meiosis under microscopic simulations and explain their significance in growth and reproductive cycles

sub_strands.name: Soil Chemistry and Macronutrient Kinetics
outcomes: Determine soil pH metrics using electrochemical probes and diagnose specific cation-exchange capacity trends
Analyze structural nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium pathways to correct crop nutritional deficiencies

sub_strands.name: Precision Irrigation and Controlled-Environment Agriculture
outcomes: Design automated closed-loop drip networks utilizing localized soil-moisture sensor loops and solar pumps
Manage microclimatic telemetry matrices (humidity, thermal variations, CO2 values) inside standard greenhouse systems

sub_strands.name: Environmental Impact Assessments (EIA) and Bioindicators
outcomes: Perform localized terrestrial or aquatic population surveys using quadrant sampling models and biotic diversity indexes
Draft elementary Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) blueprints evaluating local infrastructural interventions

sub_strands.name: Photovoltaic and Biomass Energy Optimization
outcomes: Calculate structural load sizing parameters and efficiency configurations for off-grid solar photovoltaic layouts
Design and construct scalable anaerobic bio-digester setups to convert agricultural waste products into fuel sources

sub_strands.name: Food Preservation Biochemistry and Pathogen Vectors
outcomes: Examine underlying chemical profiles governing enzyme-driven food spoilage, lipid oxidation, and cellular fermentation
Cultivate and isolate microscopic foodborne fungal or bacterial pathogens using sterile agar medium plating configurations

sub_strands.name: Linear Data Structures and Complexity Introduction
outcomes: Implement and manipulate static arrays, dynamic lists, stacks, and queues using a structured text-based programming language
Analyze algorithm execution paths using Big O notation to evaluate time and space complexity baselines

sub_strands.name: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
outcomes: Design software modules implementing core OOP pillars: encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, and abstraction
Construct unified modeling language (UML) class diagrams to architect data relationships before system implementation

sub_strands.name: First and Third Angle Orthographic Projections
outcomes: Convert complex three-dimensional isometric models into detailed 2D multi-view configurations under international drafting standards
Construct auxiliary structural views to expose true shapes of inclined and skewed plane features

sub_strands.name: Parametric 3D Modeling and Assemblies
outcomes: Generate precise parametric solid components and multi-part constraint assemblies within a CAD workspace engine
Extract standardized manufacturing blueprints complete with geometric dimensioning and tolerancing (GD&T) metrics

sub_strands.name: DC Network Analysis and Laws
outcomes: Apply Kirchhoff's Current Law (KCL) and Kirchhoff's Voltage Law (KVL) to calculate branching parameters in complex multi-loop circuits
Verify Ohm's Law and calculate total resistance for combinations of series, parallel, and delta-wye configurations

sub_strands.name: Logic Gates, Boolean Algebra, and Combinational Circuits
outcomes: Construct and minimize logic expressions using Boolean identities and Karnaugh Maps (K-Maps) up to 3 variables
Prototype physical combinational systems utilizing NAND, NOR, XOR, and standard inverter integrated circuit chips

sub_strands.name: Stress-Strain Dynamics and Destructive Testing
outcomes: Investigate tensile, compressive, and shear strain behaviors in structural engineering substrates through physical load testing
Calculate Young's Modulus metrics from linear deformation data collections while observing factor-of-safety parameters

strands.name: The Accounting Cycle and Source Documents

sub_strands.name: Double-Entry Bookkeeping and Ledger Postings
outcomes: Process business transactions through books of original entry and execute double-entry ledger postings cleanly
Extract a balanced Trial Balance and design corrective journal adjustments for errors that do or do not affect ledger balancing

sub_strands.name: Financial Statements Generation
outcomes: Construct structured Statements of Profit or Loss (Trading and Profit & Loss Accounts) and Statements of Financial Position (Balance Sheets) for sole proprietorships

sub_strands.name: Demand, Supply, and Market Equilibrium Elasticities
outcomes: Formulate and graph mathematical functions matching individual and market demand and supply metrics
Calculate and interpret Price Elasticity of Demand (PED) and Price Elasticity of Supply (PES) values alongside geometric market equilibrium shifts

sub_strands.name: Factors of Production and Monetary/Fiscal Policy Inflation Systems
outcomes: Evaluate the productivity rewards of land, labor, capital, and entrepreneurship within a developing market framework
Analyze the structural causes (demand-pull vs. cost-push) of inflation and critique Central Bank regulatory interventions

sub_strands.name: Corporate Structures, Legal Frameworks, and Strategic Business Plans
outcomes: Differentiate the operational, liability, and capital extraction privileges of sole traders, partnerships, and limited liability corporations
Draft a comprehensive, bankable strategic business plan evaluating market research metrics, operational budgets, and SWOT components

sub_strands.name: Direct vs. Indirect Rule and Armed Resistances
outcomes: Contrast the structural execution of British indirect rule against the French assimilation policy across Africa
Analyze the socio-economic impacts of settler colonialism, land alienation, and early political associations in Kenya

sub_strands.name: The World Wars and League of Nations
outcomes: Examine the underlying systemic causes and geopolitical outcomes of the First and Second World Wars
Evaluate the structural failures of the League of Nations in maintaining international collective security architectures

sub_strands.name: Plate Tectonics, Volcanicity, and Earthquakes
outcomes: Analyze mechanisms of compressional, tensional, and shearing forces according to modern plate tectonics theory
Map extrusive and intrusive volcanic features and assess their direct influence on human settlements and economic activities

sub_strands.name: Statistical Data and Introduction to GIS
outcomes: Compute and interpret geographical data metrics using standard deviation, variance, and cumulative frequency graphs
Explain the foundational data structures (vector vs. raster spatial layers) of Geographic Information Systems (GIS)

strands.name: Sovereignty of God and Covenant Systems

sub_strands.name: The Abrahamic Covenant and Sinai Mosaic Law
outcomes: Analyze the theological parameters, symbolism, and modern ethical obligations tied to the Abrahamic and Mosaic covenants
Evaluate leadership profiles of Israelite judges and early kings against modern standards of public accountability and corporate ethics

sub_strands.name: Diatonic Chords and Inversions
outcomes: Identify and construct primary and secondary diatonic triads and their inversions on a grand staff
Apply standard four-part voice leading principles (SATB) to eliminate parallel fifths and octaves in harmonic progressions

sub_strands.name: Binary, Ternary, and Sonata Form Architectural Layouts
outcomes: Analyze classical and African art music compositions to determine structural sectional boundaries and modulation pathways
Compose original thematic motifs and develop them using rhythmic variation, inversion, and retrograde techniques

sub_strands.name: Dramatic Structure, Textual Critique, and Blocking
outcomes: Deconstruct a standard play script to chart the exposition, rising action, climax, falling action, and denouement
Formulate comprehensive scene blocking diagrams and direct cast positioning utilizing spatial theater zones

sub_strands.name: Screenplay Formatting, Storyboarding, and Camera Mechanics
outcomes: Draft a short, single-scene film script conforming strictly to standard industry screenplay layout software rules
Generate a detailed operational storyboard specifying camera angles, shot sizes (extreme close-up to wide shot), and motion vectors

sub_strands.name: Linear Perspective and Human Figure Proportions
outcomes: Construct interior and exterior spatial scenes implementing accurate two-point and three-point linear perspective grids
Render anatomically accurate human figures from life, maintaining standard proportions and structural skeletal foreshortening

sub_strands.name: Color Harmonies and Gouache/Oil Painting
outcomes: Apply complex color configurations (analogous, complementary, split-complementary) to convey ambient depth and mood
Execute traditional underpainting and layering methods using gouache, acrylics, or oil paint mediums

sub_strands.name: Typography, Vector Illustration, and User Interface Fundamentals
outcomes: Design unified visual identity manuals including vector logos, layout typography hierarchies, and strict color codes
Wireframe functional, low-fidelity digital user interfaces (UI) prioritizing visual balance and accessibility guidelines

strands.name: Sculpture, Ceramics, and Sustainable Product Design

sub_strands.name: Armature Construction and Clay Kiln Firings
outcomes: Build structural wire and mesh armatures to support clay or plaster figurative sculptures
Manage complex hand-building ceramic processes (coiling, slabbing) and apply glazing recipes prior to kiln firing

sub_strands.name: Joint Kinesiology and Muscle Biomechanics
outcomes: Classify synovial joint configurations and model their structural mechanical leverage during athletic movements
Analyze the recruitment profiles of slow-twitch (Type I) and fast-twitch (Type II) muscle fibers across diverse exercise domains

sub_strands.name: Metabolic Energy Pathways
outcomes: Contrast the physiological thresholds of the ATP-CP, Anaerobic Lactic, and Aerobic metabolic energy production systems

sub_strands.name: Linear/Angular Motion Kinetics and Projectile Parameters
outcomes: Calculate angular velocity, torque, and center of mass displacements during complex jumping or throwing tasks
Evaluate variables (release velocity, angle, height) altering the parabolic trajectory path of athletic projectiles

learning_areas.name: Sports Nutrition, Coaching, and Injury Management

strands.name: Athletic Dietetics, Training Principles, and First Aid Care

sub_strands.name: Macronutrient Loading, Training Laws, and Acute Injury Triage
outcomes: Design optimized carbohydrate loading programs and hydration schedules customized to specific athletic event profiles
Apply core training principles (overload, specificity, reversibility) to design longitudinal macrocycle performance charts
Demonstrate standard on-field first aid procedures (PRICE protocol) to stabilize acute soft-tissue sports injuries safely

sub_strands.name: Principles of Inheritance
outcomes: Explain the basic principles of Mendelian inheritance
Apply genetic principles to solve simple monohybrid cross problems

sub_strands.name: Kenya's Foreign Policy
outcomes: Explain the principles guiding Kenya's foreign policy
Appreciate Kenya's role in regional and international cooperation

sub_strands.name: Introduction to Differentiation and Limits
outcomes: Understand the concept of a limit and derive the derivative of polynomial functions from first principles
Apply differentiation to determine gradients of curves, equations of tangents, and stationary points (maxima and minima)

sub_strands.name: Circles on the Cartesian Plane
outcomes: Formulate the general equation of a circle (x-a)² + (y-b)² = r² and determine its center and radius from expanded polynomial forms

sub_strands.name: Permutations and Combinations
outcomes: Solve complex arrangement and selection problems utilizing factorial notation, permutations (ⁿPᵣ), and combinations (ⁿCᵣ)

sub_strands.name: Gas Laws and Kinetic Theory of Gases
outcomes: Verify the absolute zero temperature threshold and apply the combined gas law equations contextually
Explain gas pressure variations using the kinetic theory of matter and solve heat capacity thermal energy tasks

sub_strands.name: Magnetic Effect of an Electric Current
outcomes: Map magnetic field configurations around current-carrying conductors, solenoids, and flat coils
Determine the direction and magnitude of magnetic forces on moving charges utilizing Fleming's Left-Hand Rule

sub_strands.name: Reaction Rates and Chemical Equilibrium
outcomes: Investigate factors altering reaction kinetics (concentration, temperature, surface area, catalysts) using collision theory models
Apply Le Chatelier's Principle to predict equilibrium shifts in dynamic reversible chemical networks

sub_strands.name: Alkanols and Alkanoic Acids
outcomes: Synthesize and classify primary, secondary, and tertiary alkanols and map out esterification reaction profiles
Determine structural variations and IUPAC naming protocols for alkanoic acids up to carbon-5

sub_strands.name: Excretion and Osmoregulation Structures
outcomes: Analyze the structural anatomy and counter-current multiplier mechanics of the mammalian nephron unit
Examine homeostatic feedback mechanisms managed by Antidiuretic Hormone (ADH) and Aldosterone during fluid changes

sub_strands.name: Dihybrid Inheritance and Sex Linkage
outcomes: Model dihybrid inheritance patterns (9:3:3:1 phenotypic distributions) using advanced genetic matrix diagrams
Trace sex-linked traits including hemophilia and color blindness across generational pedigree charts

sub_strands.name: Artificial Insemination and Infectious Disease Controls
outcomes: Evaluate genetic selection criteria and mechanics matching artificial insemination pipelines in domestic herds
Diagnose life cycles, vector profiles, and biosecurity protocols for tick-borne diseases and zoonotic infections

sub_strands.name: Internal Combustion Engines and Power Take-Off (PTO) Lines
outcomes: Differentiate structural operation dynamics inside two-stroke and four-stroke diesel internal combustion engines
Manage mechanical attachments matching tractor power take-off (PTO) units safely under work criteria

sub_strands.name: Effluent Treatment and Eutrophication Mitigation
outcomes: Design structural multi-stage industrial wastewater treatment layouts involving sedimentation, aeration, and disinfection bio-steps
Monitor biological oxygen demand (BOD) metrics to estimate effluent pollution stress inside surface rivers

sub_strands.name: Trees, Graphs, and Relational Databases
outcomes: Implement and traverse binary search trees and basic graph structures using structural text coding
